frontend_dependency_chains.entry_point: App.tsx imports 8 sections (Navigation, Hero, Features, About, Testimonials, CTA, Footer, WhatsAppWidget)
frontend_dependency_chains.api_layer: src/lib/api.ts provides api.get/post/put/patch/delete wrappers — used by all data-fetching components

missing_backend_routes: GET /api/messages/{consultation_id} — MessagesPage.tsx calls it, only WebSocket route exists
GET /api/preferences — PreferencesPage.tsx calls it, no route exists
PUT /api/preferences — PreferencesPage.tsx calls it, no route exists
GET /api/astrologers/favorites — PreferencesPage.tsx calls it, no route exists
GET /api/cosmic-calendar/upcoming — Dashboard.tsx calls it, only /transits exists
GET /api/kundli/{id}/dasha — Dashboard.tsx uses GET but backend only defines POST
backend_only_endpoints: 30+ routes never called from frontend (admin APIs, webhooks, utility endpoints)
